lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it left the showroom. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish, and the interior is pristine with no signs of wear or use. Every mechanical and electronic component functions perfectly, and the car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that is essentially brand new in every measurable way.

$20,000 - This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some visible scratches and minor dings. The interior shows moderate wear on the seats and carpeting. It is mechanically functional but may require some maintenance in the near future.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle is offered in concours-level condition, exhibiting a flawless finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine automobile.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you—this car is a total dream! It’s in truly incredible shape, honestly looking and driving like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this beauty from day one with meticulous care, so it’s sparkling clean and runs like a charm. It’s been my favorite way to get around, but it's time for someone else to enjoy how special it is. Come take a look—you’re going to adore it!

Presenting a museum-grade E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is perfectly timed by a fully overhauled VANOS system. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a mechanical limited-slip differential, the chassis dynamics are sharp and predictable. Crucial preventative maintenance has been executed, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. A pristine, driver-centric specimen for the discerning collector.
2022 model. Pristine condition. Zero mechanical issues. No interior wear. Garage kept. Full service records available. Inspections welcome.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation: a 2012 Porsche 911 Carrera in Carrara White over a Black leather interior. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment and presents in a state that rivals its original showroom delivery. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with no discernible rock chips or swirl marks, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Every body panel is original, with factory-perfect gaps and no history of accidents or paintwork. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the leather seats show zero bolster wear, the dashboard remains supple without any sun-induced shrinkage, and the original floor mats are pristine. All switchgear functions with a crisp, tactile response, and the electronics are in perfect working order. Mechanically, this Carrera is beyond reproach. It has been serviced exclusively by authorized technicians, with a thick binder of records documenting every oil change and inspection since new. The most recent major service included a full fluid flush and a fresh set of N-rated tires. It drives exactly as the engineers intended—tight, responsive, and powerful. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a modern classic that requires absolutely nothing but a new home. Serious inquiries only; PPIs are welcome at the buyer's expense.

We are honored to present this superlative motorcar, an exemplar of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, this vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic contours and uncompromising mechanical integrity. Every facet of this automobile, from its pristine interior appointments to its mirror-finish exterior, reflects a pedigree of fastidious ownership. This is an unrivaled opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of significant stature and investment-grade quality.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly stunning condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this beauty since day one, so it’s spotless inside and out. It drives like a dream and is ready for a new home. You won't find another one this clean! Come take a look and see for yourself! 🚗✨

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This example features the legendary S54B32 inline-six, exhibiting perfect factory compression and a recently overhauled double-VANOS system for optimal cam timing. The drivetrain consists of a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a variable M-differential lock, ensuring mechanical purity. Critically, the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and the rod bearings have been replaced with treated shells to ensure longevity. The suspension retains its factory-spec handling characteristics with zero deflection in the bushings or ball joints. Finished in Carbon Black with flawless paint depth, this chassis shows no signs of oxidation or fatigue. A mechanically transparent, collector-quality machine for the discerning purist.
2022 model. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service records. Non-smoker. No interior wear.
